title: Raccoon Removal in Tottenville, Staten Island | $900-$4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Tottenville, Staten Island. Humane trapping, exclusion & cleanup. Licensed experts serving residential areas near Conference House Park. Call today!
intro: Tottenville's waterfront location and tree-lined residential streets create an ideal habitat for raccoons seeking shelter in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive raccoon removal services throughout Tottenville, from the historic Conference House area to the neighborhoods along Arthur Kill Road. Our licensed wildlife specialists use humane trapping methods and permanent exclusion solutions to protect your Staten Island home.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Tottenville homeowners for years with safe, effective raccoon removal backed by full licensing and insurance. Our technicians understand the unique challenges of Staten Island's southernmost community and provide same-day emergency response with guaranteed results and complete attic restoration services.
localContext: Tottenville's many Victorian-era homes and suburban properties near Bethel Cemetery and Lemon Creek offer numerous entry points for raccoons, including aging roof vents, chimney caps, and foundation gaps. The neighborhood's proximity to wooded areas, Conference House Park, and the Arthur Kill waterfront means raccoon activity remains high year-round, especially during breeding season from late winter through spring.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Tottenville?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Tottenville typically ranges from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring exclusion, and extent of attic damage. A single raccoon removal with basic exclusion starts around $900, while extensive infestations with multiple animals, babies, and significant cleanup can reach $4,000. We provide free inspections and transparent pricing before any work begins.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Tottenville, Staten Island?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are very common in Tottenville due to the area's proximity to Conference House Park, Lemon Creek, and wooded areas along the Arthur Kill. The neighborhood's older homes and tree-covered properties provide ideal denning sites, and raccoons are frequently found in attics, chimneys, and under porches, especially during spring when mothers seek safe places to raise their young.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a raccoon problem in Tottenville?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for raccoon removal in Tottenville and throughout Staten Island. Emergency situations such as raccoons in living spaces or aggressive animals receive priority response, often within hours of your call. Our team is familiar with Tottenville's streets and can quickly reach properties near Page Avenue, Amboy Road, or anywhere in the neighborhood.

faqs.question: Do you provide humane raccoon removal in Tottenville?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use only humane, industry-approved trapping methods that comply with New York State wildlife regulations. Our process includes live trapping, safe relocation when permitted, proper handling of mothers with babies, thorough exclusion to prevent re-entry, and complete sanitization and repair of affected areas. We never use poisons or inhumane removal tactics.
